window_summary: This window tracks the recent ventoy/Ventoy release stream from v1.0.83 through v1.1.12, covering multi-language boot menu support, new OS compatibility, bug fixes, and the transition to the 1.1.x series with improved remount handling and btrfs experimental support.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ventoy/Ventoy
Release: Ventoy 1.0.83 release

Release notes:
This release was deprecated because of a BUG. Please wait for new release.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ventoy/Ventoy release v1.0.83, the release was deprecated because of a BUG and users were asked to wait for a new release.

chunks.title: Ventoy 1.0.84 release
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ventoy/Ventoy
Release: Ventoy 1.0.84 release
Tag: v1.0.84; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-12-04T07:40:00Z; created_at: 2022-12-04T07:33:16Z
Release notes:
**1. Multi-Language supported for Ventoy boot menu. [Notes](https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_menu_language.html)**
2. Add `L` hotkey to choose language.
3. Change `F1` hotkey from memdisk mode to help information.
4. Add `Ctrl+d` hotkey for memdisk mode.
5. Add `VTOY_MENU_LANGUAGE` option in Global Control Plugin for default menu language.
6. Remove `VTOY_HELP_TXT_LANGUAGE` option, use `VTOY_MENU_LANGUAGE` option uniformly.
7. Ventoy2Disk.exe: Add `Cluster Size` option for Ventoy install.
8. Ventoy2Disk.exe: Support FAT32 for 32GB+ disk.
9. Ventoy2Disk.exe: Fix the format failure when install Ventoy in some WinPE/Lite Windows.
10. Ventoy2Disk.exe: Change the `lock` icon for secure boot option to a yellow picture.
11. Ventoy2Disk.exe: Show a tip message for cluster size when the mouse hover on the file system string.
12. Ventoy2Disk.exe: Add `UDF` file system for Ventoy install.
13. VentoyPlugson.exe: Fix the garbled characters when preview json which contains unicode characters.
14. Add `VentoyPlugson_X64.exe` for convenience when used in WinPE.
15. Update Shim/Mokmanager efi files.
16. languages.json update
See [https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_news.html](https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_news.html) for more details.
**About Ventoy Subscription Service**
Ventoy is an open source software under GPLv3 license.
But Ventoy project need to pay for the server hosting, domain name, bandwidth, many USB sticks for test, large capacity of HDD (for downloading ISO files) and so on.
For the better and sustainable development of Ventoy, I provide the subscription service.
For details please refer: [https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_subscription.html](https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_subscription.html)
**SHA-256**
```
ventoy-1.0.84-windows.zip:     b4c98f0fe3432007a64f6787fe409341f7558bd6a3c0a8312726f744146e67c0
ventoy-1.0.84-linux.tar.gz:    ca0200c36ef43f1e6746b4abb03df22c144504a1b0cddc57cd0eae752f60d992
ventoy-1.0.84-livecd.iso:      2db98ea9cb2fdfa56e14c6d2fd52f15579d11ff463d9a079b4fef74689591dae
```
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ventoy/Ventoy release v1.0.84, multi-language support was added for the Ventoy boot menu, along with hotkey changes (L for language, F1 for help, Ctrl+d for memdisk mode), a VTOY_MENU_LANGUAGE option in Global Control Plugin, removal of VTOY_HELP_TXT_LANGUAGE, and Ventoy2Disk.exe gained Cluster Size option, FAT32 support for 32GB+ disks, UDF file system support, and fixes for format failures in WinPE/Lite Windows.

Release: Ventoy 1.0.85 release
Tag: v1.0.85; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-12-18T14:26:16Z; created_at: 2022-12-18T14:11:28Z
Release notes:
1. Fix the format failure when install Ventoy.
2. Auto memdisk plugin support some IMA/IMG files.
3. Optimization for booting memtest86-usb.img.
4. Grub2 mode supports KNOPPIX.

But Ventoy project need to pay for the server hosting, domain name, bandwidth, many USB sticks for test, large capacity of HDD (for downloading ISO files) and so on.
For the better and sustainable development of Ventoy, I provide the subscription service.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ventoy/Ventoy release v1.0.85, a format failure during Ventoy installation was fixed, auto memdisk plugin gained support for some IMA/IMG files, booting memtest86-usb.img was optimized, Grub2 mode added KNOPPIX support, a boot issue with Peux distro iso files was fixed, and new menu languages were added.

chunks.title: Ventoy 1.0.86 release
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ventoy/Ventoy
Release: Ventoy 1.0.86 release
Tag: v1.0.86; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-12-24T13:26:14Z; created_at: 2022-12-24T13:19:31Z
Release notes:
1. Add `F5 Tools ---> Temporary Control Settings` menu. [Notes](https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_ctrl_settings.html)
2. Ventoy2Disk.exe now supports command line mode. [Notes](https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_windows_cli.html)
3. Add `VTOY_WIN11_BYPASS_NRO` option in global control plugin to bypass online account requirement when intall Windows 11.
4. Enable `VTOY_WIN11_BYPASS_CHECK` and `VTOY_WIN11_BYPASS_NRO` by default.
5. Add `resolution_fit` option in theme plugin. [Notes](https://www.ventoy.net/en/plugin_theme.html#vtoy_theme_res_fit)
6. Change the MBR partition type to 0xC if user selects FAT32 when intall Ventoy.
7. VentoyPlugson: Add duplicate file path check in different lower/upper cases.
8. Change egrep to grep -E for some scripts. (#2083)
9. Add new menu languages
10. languages.json update
See [https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_news.html](https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_news.html) for more details.
**About Ventoy Subscription Service**
Ventoy is an open source software under GPLv3 license.
But Ventoy project need to pay for the server hosting, domain name, bandwidth, many USB sticks for test, large capacity of HDD (for downloading ISO files) and so on.
For the better and sustainable development of Ventoy, I provide the subscription service.
For details please refer: [https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_subscription.html](https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_subscription.html)
**SHA-256**
```
ventoy-1.0.86-windows.zip:     fb414f4546a62fd7688b30d7f483521bd9b740f716fae176911d9e966e4b99f5
ventoy-1.0.86-linux.tar.gz:    92cc57300ec63e516b3e2d6825af988389b2eaa306c15ae138bee92ebb9788d0
ventoy-1.0.86-livecd.iso:      adcda85d6152331b492793f62adb9e486718f1ad8dbaddc9c9e318f347630dc0
```
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ventoy/Ventoy release v1.0.86, a 'F5 Tools ---> Temporary Control Settings' menu was added, Ventoy2Disk.exe gained command line mode support, VTOY_WIN11_BYPASS_NRO option was added to bypass online account requirement during Windows 11 install, VTOY_WIN11_BYPASS_CHECK and VTOY_WIN11_BYPASS_NRO were enabled by default, a resolution_fit option was added in theme plugin, MBR partition type was changed to 0xC for FAT32 installs, and VentoyPlugson added duplicate file path check.

chunks.title: Ventoy 1.0.87 release
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ventoy/Ventoy
Release: Ventoy 1.0.87 release
Tag: v1.0.87; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-01-07T08:14:12Z; created_at: 2023-01-07T07:57:53Z
Release notes:
1. Add `return to previous menu` in secondary boot menu for convenience.
2. Add `max` value for screen resolution option in theme plugin. [Notes](https://www.ventoy.net/en/plugin_theme.html)
3. Fix the bug when F2 browse and boot VHD/VHDX files in an extend logic partition.
4. Fix the menu title of `F5 Tools ---> Power ---> $VTLANG_POWER_REBOOT_EFIFW`
5. Support BSD style for .md5/.sha1/.sh256/.sha512 checksum file. (#2112)
6. Support `VENTOY_CHECKSUM` file for checksum value match. [Notes](https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_checksum.html#checksum_compare)
7. Disable Fn hotkeys in autoinstall/persistence/wim select menu.
8. Fix the blank item in the last of Language select menu.
9. Fix the menu display issue when use persistence (VTLANG_NO_PERSISTENCE).
10. Add support for Lenovo Product Recovery iso file.
11. Add support for Dell PER ISO. (#2113)
12. grub2 mode supports Porteus ISO file.
13. Fix the file path when file checksum in F2 browse mode.
14. Add new menu languages
15. languages.json update
See [https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_news.html](https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_news.html) for more details.
**About Ventoy Subscription Service**
Ventoy is an open source software under GPLv3 license.
But Ventoy project need to pay for the server hosting, domain name, bandwidth, many USB sticks for test, large capacity of HDD (for downloading ISO files) and so on.
For the better and sustainable development of Ventoy, I provide the subscription service.
For details please refer: [https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_subscription.html](https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_subscription.html)
**SHA-256**
```
ventoy-1.0.87-windows.zip:     d40d3747c448368e3a8402aba922e88af7da717dd0ec1523dec6957f18fa9603
ventoy-1.0.87-linux.tar.gz:    d26ecc5cbb52baaf06743157cca798f3a0c882581e43ac3212da4ec81fed8647
ventoy-1.0.87-livecd.iso:      73a777405fb70ff6a494cc9edae1077347adcd816d83c4c92469da78e4b781e1
```
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ventoy/Ventoy release v1.0.87, a 'return to previous menu' was added in secondary boot menu, a 'max' value for screen resolution option was added in theme plugin, a bug when browsing and booting VHD/VHDX files in an extend logic partition was fixed, BSD style checksum files were supported, VENTOY_CHECKSUM file support was added, Fn hotkeys were disabled in autoinstall/persistence/wim select menu, a blank item in the language select menu was fixed, and support was added for Lenovo Product Recovery iso and Dell PER ISO.

chunks.title: Ventoy 1.0.88 release
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ventoy/Ventoy
Release: Ventoy 1.0.88 release
Tag: v1.0.88; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-01-13T14:04:28Z; created_at: 2023-01-13T13:57:44Z
Release notes:
1. Fix the VHD(x) boot issue introduced in 1.0.87.
2. Add more options for Windows command line mode. [Notes](https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_windows_cli.html)
3. VentoyPlguson: Fix VTOY_WIN11_BYPASS_CHECK option web page display issue.
4. Fix that workaround #2 not working for Legacy BIOS access limit.
5. Fix a syntax error in F4 localboot.
6. Show file checksum menu title according to the existence of checksum value.
7. Automatically switch to en_US when use text mode.
8. Add unsupported tip message for 4k native disk.
9. languages.json update
See [https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_news.html](https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_news.html) for more details.
**About Ventoy Subscription Service**
Ventoy is an open source software under GPLv3 license.
But Ventoy project need to pay for the server hosting, domain name, bandwidth, many USB sticks for test, large capacity of HDD (for downloading ISO files) and so on.
For the better and sustainable development of Ventoy, I provide the subscription service.
For details please refer: [https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_subscription.html](https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_subscription.html)
**SHA-256**
```

ventoy-1.0.88-linux.tar.gz:    9a0d5dcd74442213bd2eca0211abae051f444861ccdd1be814dfb9bc75341c30
ventoy-1.0.88-livecd.iso:      00e6bca25c17a97b92b22aa876ea56e92f8a9216fa92ab2e1c93373498509f1e
```
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ventoy/Ventoy release v1.0.88, a VHD(x) boot issue introduced in 1.0.87 was fixed, more options were added for Windows command line mode, VentoyPlugson fixed VTOY_WIN11_BYPASS_CHECK display issue, workaround #2 for Legacy BIOS access limit was fixed, a syntax error in F4 localboot was fixed, file checksum menu title now shows according to checksum existence, text mode automatically switches to en_US, and an unsupported tip message for 4k native disk was added.

chunks.title: Ventoy 1.0.89 release
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ventoy/Ventoy
Release: Ventoy 1.0.89 release
Tag: v1.0.89; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-03-07T11:45:35Z; created_at: 2023-03-07T11:21:15Z
Release notes:
1. Fix the issue that `VTOY_LINUX_REMOUNT` can not work in new linux kernel.
2. Fix the issue that Ventoy2Disk_X64.exe can not run under altexe directory.
3. Fix the issue that VentoyPlugson_X64.exe exit silently.
4. Add missing /FS option for Ventoy2Disk.exe in Windows command line mode.
5. Ventoy2Disk.exe automatically change current directory when started from other directory.
6. Add tip message when theme file contains non-enclosed literal values. (#2166)
7. Ignore reserved space when do non-destructive installation via GUI. (#2168)
8. Fix the menu missing issue when there exist an invalid vlnk file. (#2228)
9. languages.json update
See [https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_news.html](https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_news.html) for more details.
**About Ventoy Subscription Service**
Ventoy is an open source software under GPLv3 license.
But Ventoy project need to pay for the server hosting, domain name, bandwidth, many USB sticks for test, large capacity of HDD (for downloading ISO files) and so on.
For the better and sustainable development of Ventoy, I provide the subscription service.
For details please refer: [https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_subscription.html](https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_subscription.html)
**SHA-256**
```
ventoy-1.0.89-windows.zip:     de104625b00909a221a7ef45927b66c47bd59d32305f7ec740875549f64e9de2
ventoy-1.0.89-linux.tar.gz:    74f04c001ce621351e9ce7b9ec10f9126a1f65e5c2f6fe88a56ee6f8e86161d0
ventoy-1.0.89-livecd.iso:      c859fc47121895331f2396e87b221840dcc2c79e28a683d06db90fc2afc844f5
```
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ventoy/Ventoy release v1.0.89, the issue that VTOY_LINUX_REMOUNT could not work in new linux kernel was fixed, Ventoy2Disk_X64.exe not running under altexe directory was fixed, VentoyPlugson_X64.exe silent exit was fixed, missing /FS option for Ventoy2Disk.exe in command line mode was added, Ventoy2Disk.exe automatically changes current directory when started from other directory, a tip message was added when theme file contains non-enclosed literal values, reserved space is ignored during non-destructive installation via GUI, and a menu missing issue with invalid vlnk files was fixed.

chunks.title: Ventoy 1.0.90 release
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ventoy/Ventoy
Release: Ventoy 1.0.90 release
Tag: v1.0.90; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-03-26T11:11:57Z; created_at: 2023-03-26T11:01:13Z
Release notes:
1. Fix the issue that `VTOY_LINUX_REMOUNT` option can not work for (Kernel 5.18+) + (Intel Gen11+ CPU).
2. Support LibreELEC 11.0+. (#2281)
3. Fix the issue that Fedora Rawhide install media not detected. (#2283)
4. Add support for chimera linux. (#2309)
5. Optimization for Fedora boot process.
6. languages.json update.
7. New iso support. (Total 1100+)
See [https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_news.html](https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_news.html) for more details.

But Ventoy project need to pay for the server hosting, domain name, bandwidth, many USB sticks for test, large capacity of HDD (for downloading ISO files) and so on.
For the better and sustainable development of Ventoy, I provide the subscription service.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ventoy/Ventoy release v1.0.90, the issue that VTOY_LINUX_REMOUNT option could not work for Kernel 5.18+ with Intel Gen11+ CPU was fixed, LibreELEC 11.0+ support was added, Fedora Rawhide install media detection was fixed, chimera linux support was added, Fedora boot process was optimized, and new iso support brought the total to 1100+.

Tag: v1.0.91; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-04-05T13:02:30Z; created_at: 2023-04-05T12:41:34Z
Release notes:
1. Add support for FreeBSD 14-CURRENT.
2. Fix the issue for booting Bliss OS 15.x (#2329)
3. Fix a bug that Fedora boot error if Ventoy partition is NTFS. (#2333)
4. Add Recognition for NTFS with large cluster size (greater than 64KB).
5. Improve grub2 mode process for legacy BIOS mode.
6. languages.json update.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ventoy/Ventoy release v1.0.91, support for FreeBSD 14-CURRENT was added, a boot issue for Bliss OS 15.x was fixed, a bug causing Fedora boot error when Ventoy partition is NTFS was fixed, recognition for NTFS with large cluster size (>64KB) was added, and grub2 mode process for legacy BIOS mode was improved.

chunks.title: Ventoy 1.0.93 release
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ventoy/Ventoy
Release: Ventoy 1.0.93 release
Tag: v1.0.93; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-06-23T15:12:00Z; created_at: 2023-06-23T15:07:21Z
Release notes:
1. Fix the boot issue for Fedora/CentOS when file name contains special character. (#2360)
2. Support unattended auto install for Deepin/UOS.
3. Fix a bug that if you plug-out the USB drive during installation, Ventoy will be probabilistically installed to other disk.
4. Correct EFI chainloader image device path. (#2397)
5. languages.json update.
**Wana boot and install OS through network (PXE)? Welcome to my new project iVentoy.**
**About iVentoy [https://www.iventoy.com](https://www.iventoy.com)**
iVentoy is an enhanced version of the PXE server.
Extremely easy to use
Many advanced features
x86 Legacy BIOS, IA32 UEFI, x86_64 UEFI and ARM64 UEFI mode supported
110+ common types of OS supported (Windows/WinPE/Linux/VMware)
......
**About Ventoy Subscription Service**
Ventoy is an open source software under GPLv3 license.
But Ventoy project need to pay for the server hosting, domain name, bandwidth, many USB sticks for test, large capacity of HDD (for downloading ISO files) and so on.
For the better and sustainable development of Ventoy, I provide the subscription service.
For details please refer: [https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_subscription.html](https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_subscription.html)
**SHA-256**
```

ventoy-1.0.93-linux.tar.gz:    a33e4856ad10b0f5fdd0de0406895dd9043cfc26385c5f8a710e352fe4d1e222
ventoy-1.0.93-livecd.iso:      0d2932d75bcd2ef63049adf173d52fdca1fdcd2058371527d52cd49b07eeea92
```
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ventoy/Ventoy release v1.0.93, a boot issue for Fedora/CentOS when file name contains special character was fixed, unattended auto install support for Deepin/UOS was added, a bug where unplugging the USB drive during installation could probabilistically install Ventoy to another disk was fixed, and EFI chainloader image device path was corrected.

Release notes:
1. Drag to resize Ventoy2Disk.exe dialog width.
2. Fix a bug when booting veket_24.
3. Fix a bug when booting the latest UOS server ISO.
4. New distro support `vanilladpup`
4. New distro support `FydeOS 17`
5. languages.json update.
**Wana boot and install OS through network (PXE)? Welcome to my new project iVentoy.**
**About iVentoy [https://www.iventoy.com](https://www.iventoy.com)**
iVentoy is an enhanced version of the PXE server.
Extremely easy to use
Many advanced features
x86 Legacy BIOS, IA32 UEFI, x86_64 UEFI and ARM64 UEFI mode supported
110+ common types of OS supported (Windows/WinPE/Linux/VMware)
......
**About Ventoy Subscription Service**
Ventoy is an open source software under GPLv3 license.
But Ventoy project need to pay for the server hosting, domain name, bandwidth, many USB sticks for test, large capacity of HDD (for downloading ISO files) and so on.
For the better and sustainable development of Ventoy, I provide the subscription service.
For details please refer: [https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_subscription.html](https://www.ventoy.net/en/doc_subscription.html)

```
ventoy-1.0.95-livecd.iso:      1072d2d44c25c4ed7053952ff8e3fff840083168e1f07fc1e8b4f1fe964b1bec
```

questions.query_text: In the ventoy/Ventoy releases, which release adds experimental support for btrfs file system with the limitation that ISO files cannot be compressed?

answer_support.answer_text: Experimental support for btrfs file system. ... ISO file can NOT be compressed.

questions.query_text: Across the ventoy/Ventoy releases, how does the handling of VTOY_LINUX_REMOUNT differ between v1.0.99 and v1.1.01?

options.text: v1.0.99 fixes VTOY_LINUX_REMOUNT for openSUSE, while v1.1.01 optimizes the implementation to support all Linux distros and deprecates the option.
v1.0.99 removes VTOY_LINUX_REMOUNT entirely, while v1.1.01 reintroduces it for legacy systems.
Both releases only update EFI boot files without changing VTOY_LINUX_REMOUNT.
v1.0.99 adds VTOY_LINUX_REMOUNT for the first time, while v1.1.01 restricts it to RHEL9/CentOS9.

questions.expected_answer: v1.0.99 fixes VTOY_LINUX_REMOUNT for openSUSE, while v1.1.01 optimizes the implementation to support all Linux distros and deprecates the option.

answer_support.answer_text: Fix the issue that VTOY_LINUX_REMOUNT can not take effect in latest openSUSE.
Optimization for VTOY_LINUX_REMOUNT implementation to support all Linux distros. ... VTOY_LINUX_REMOUNT option now is deprecated.

questions.query_text: In the ventoy/Ventoy release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds multi-language support for the Ventoy boot menu, (2) a release that fixes the 0x80070001 error when booting and installing Windows 11, (3) a release that adds support for FreeBSD 15.0, (4) a release that adds experimental btrfs support.

answer_support.answer_text: Multi-Language supported for Ventoy boot menu.
Fix the 0x80070001 error when boot and install Windows 11.
Experimental support for btrfs file system.
